author.bio: Software Engineer | Design Systems @logmein; previously @ibm && creating content @ladybugpodcast @codingcoach_io | American living in Germany 🇩🇪
author.name: Emma Bostian 🐞

content.text:
*Honest job interview*

Interviewer: “What’s your biggest weakness?”

Me: “Sometimes I fuck up my rebase so badly I delete the repo and clone a new copy 🔥🙆‍♀️”
